features.title: Bootstrap minimal AI agent harness template
features.description: Create the harness state files, schema, prompts, validation scripts, and tiny example needed to prove the template works end to end.
acceptance: ./init.sh validates required files and feature_list.json
scripts/validate-feature.sh F001 validates the selected feature
scripts/summarize-progress.sh prints feature totals and next work
examples/tiny-cli test coverage passes without third-party dependencies

features.title: Add vendor-neutral lightweight orchestrator
features.description: Add a generic orchestrator that follows the startup protocol, selects one unfinished feature, previews or runs Coding Agent and Evaluator Agent prompts, supports eval-only mode, and keeps vendor-specific agent execution configurable.
acceptance: orchestrator.py exists at the template root
python3 orchestrator.py --dry-run runs the startup protocol and exits successfully when there is no unfinished feature
python3 orchestrator.py --eval-only F001 --dry-run previews the evaluator prompt
./init.sh validates orchestrator.py syntax
README.md and SPEC.md document the orchestrator boundary

features.title: Adopt practiced AGENTS guardrails
features.description: Refine the template AGENTS.md using proven guardrails from the production agent workflow, including initializer responsibilities, state safety rules, external behavior verification, external tool schema rules, work rules, anti-patterns, and recoverability goals.
acceptance: AGENTS.md includes an Initializer role for bootstrapping repository state
AGENTS.md includes state safety rules for preserving feature_list.json fields and ordering
AGENTS.md includes external behavior verification rules for CLI, API, runtime, and structured tool output assumptions
AGENTS.md includes anti-patterns that prevent premature completion and chat-history reliance
./init.sh passes after the guardrail update

features.title: Add testing layers to the harness template
features.description: Add an explicit test plan and dependency-free unit, contract, and smoke test layers to the template, wire them into ./init.sh, and document how downstream projects should extend the layers.
acceptance: test_plan.md documents the verification entry point and unit, contract, harness, and smoke layers
test/unit contains tests for validation and progress helper behavior
test/contract contains tests that lock AGENTS, feature schema, prompts, and orchestrator contracts
test/smoke contains an end-to-end smoke test for the template commands
./init.sh runs unit, contract, smoke, and optional harness tests

features.title: Strengthen contract tests for AI harness obligations
features.description: Refine contract tests so they verify AI agent obligations and harness boundaries, including external behavior verification, feature state preservation, prompt restrictions, evaluator anti-premature-completion rules, and orchestrator state-transition contracts.
acceptance: Contract tests verify AGENTS external behavior verification requirements beyond section presence
Contract tests verify feature state fields, uniqueness, done/pass consistency, and unknown-field preservation requirements
Contract tests verify work, continue, and evaluate prompts constrain AI behavior and state mutation
Contract tests verify orchestrator state-transition and eval-only boundaries by static inspection
./init.sh passes after strengthening contract coverage

features.title: Replace generic agent command with role adapters
features.description: Remove the generic HARNESS_AGENT_COMMAND orchestration hook and make orchestrator.py dispatch explicit Coding Agent and Evaluator Agent role adapters instead.
acceptance: orchestrator.py no longer references HARNESS_AGENT_COMMAND
orchestrator.py dispatches scripts/run-coding-agent.sh for Coding Agent prompts
orchestrator.py dispatches scripts/run-evaluator-agent.sh for Evaluator Agent prompts
README.md, SPEC.md, and AGENTS.md document role adapters instead of a generic agent command
./init.sh passes after the adapter boundary change
